title: dolichos rufus
intro: Dolichos rufus, also known as the Horse Gram, is a type of legume native to India and parts of Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce blood sugar levels, lower cholesterol, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Dolichos rufus include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve digestion, and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Dolichos rufus is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, and it can also be consumed as a powder or in capsule form.
